channel.title: UIC-STAT HPC – Research
channel.description: Recent content in Research on UIC-STAT HPC

item.title: Research: CodeHub - Generation II
item.description:
CodeHub Gen II

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Bootstrap5
    • Data Dashboard: bokeh
    • Editor: Manacco Editor
    • Web Terminal: Xterm.js
  • Backend: Flask
  • Database: MariaDB

Components

Basically, the Code-Hub has(will have) these three main components:

  1. User Management: Authentication, Authorization and Questioning System
    1. account application form collection
    2. Single Sign ON (OpenLDAP + JWT)
    3. Time-based One-Time Password
    4. Ticket System
  2. System Security Cluster Status and User (danger operation) Monitoring
    1. Server current usage and historical usage - (optional: netdata)
    2. Auditing (Asciinema)
    3. Auto Blocking (Crypto-mining and etc.)
  3. Web-based Coding Interface
    1. Web Terminal (Xterm.js with socketio) - optional
    2. Files Management (simple upload + download)
    3. Proxy Service (for code-server, MATLAB, RStudio, and etc.)

item.title: Research: Acknowledgement
item.description:
Please don’t forget to acknowledge the role that BNU-HKBU United International College Statistics’s HPC resources have played in your research and testing. We appreciate your conscientiousness in this matter.

The computations in this paper were performed using the Bayes Cluster (USBC) provided by Department of Statistics, BNU-HKBU United International College.

item.title: Research: Achievement
item.description:
Publication Information Scimago Matrix
Lai, J., Weng, L. C., Peng, X., & Fang, K. T. (2022). Construction of symmetric orthogonal designs with deep Q-network and orthogonal complementary design. Computational Statistics & Data Analysis, 107448.
Liu, J. J., Tsang, K. T., & Deng, Y. H. (2022). A variant RSA acceleration with parallelisation. International Journal of Parallel, Emergent and Distributed Systems, 1-15.
